name: obligatory_ai-generated-comment

---

# Obligatory AI-Generated Comment Skill

## Purpose

Ensure every new file and every new class created with AI assistance contains the exact traceability comment `generated by AI in Github cloud`. This provides consistency and auditability across all AI-assisted contributions in the repository.

## Source

Derived from: `cookbooks/ai-generated-comment-guideline.md`

## When to Apply

- When **creating any new source file** (Java, Python, XML, YAML, JSON, HTML, shell scripts, etc.).
- When **adding a new class definition** inside an existing file.
- This rule is **obligatory** — it must never be skipped, omitted, or applied partially.

## Rules

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Comment text | Must be **exactly**: `generated by AI in Github cloud` |
| Placement in a new file | Place near the **top** of the file, before the first meaningful statement |
| Placement for a new class | Place in a comment **directly above** (or as first comment inside) each new class definition |
| Format | Use the comment syntax appropriate for the language: `//` for Java/JS/TS, `#` for Python/YAML/Shell, `<!-- -->` for XML/HTML |
| Consistency | Do **not** paraphrase, abbreviate, capitalise differently, or alter the text in any way — it must be verbatim |

## Language Examples

### Java (new file + new class)

```java
// generated by AI in Github cloud
import java.time.LocalDate;

// generated by AI in Github cloud
public class HelloWorld {

    // generated by AI in Github cloud
    record Greeting(String recipient, String message) {
        // ...
    }
}
```

### Python

```python
# generated by AI in Github cloud

# generated by AI in Github cloud
class HelloWorld:
    pass
```

### XML / Maven POM

```xml
<!-- generated by AI in Github cloud -->
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0">
  ...
</project>
```

### YAML

```yaml
# generated by AI in Github cloud
name: my-workflow
on: [push]
```

### Shell / Bash

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# generated by AI in Github cloud
```

## Checklist

Before finalising any AI-generated change, verify:

- [ ] Every **new file** has `generated by AI in Github cloud` near the top.
- [ ] Every **new class** has `generated by AI in Github cloud` directly above or as the first comment inside it.
- [ ] The comment text is **verbatim** — no extra words, no punctuation changes, no capitalisation changes.
- [ ] The comment format matches the target language's comment syntax.
